zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye於大約1044年出生在法國阿奎泰吉洛德布萊也時，他的父親Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye21歲，母親Agnes Perigord27歲。他於大約1074年與Anne Bigod在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1089年7月29日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾維特林享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye于大约1044年出生在法国阿奎泰吉洛德布萊也时，他的父亲Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye21岁，母亲Agnes Perigord27岁。他于大约1074年与Anne Bigod在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1089年7月29日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾維特林享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye was born about 1044, in Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, France, his father, Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye, was 21 and his mother, Agnes Perigord, was 27. He married Anne Bigod about 1074, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 29 July 1089, in Wittering, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye est né environ 1044, à Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, France, son père, Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agnes Perigord, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Anne Bigod environ 1074, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 juillet 1089, à Wittering, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye um 1044 in Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye 21 und seine Mutter Agnes Perigord 27. Er hat um 1074 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Anne Bigod geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Juli 1089 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Wittering, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye è nato il circa 1044 nel Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Perigord, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Anne Bigod circa 1074, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 luglio 1089, nel Wittering, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blayeが約1044年にフランスアクイティアインギロンドブレイで生まれた時，父Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blayeは21歳，母Agnes Perigordは27歳であった。約1074年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでAnne Bigodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1089年7月29日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウィッテリングで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye(이)가 대략 1044년 프랑스 아키테인 지론드 블레이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Perigord(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1074년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Anne Bigod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1089년 7월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 윗테링에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye nasceu aproximadamente 1044, em Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Perigord, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Bigod aproximadamente 1074, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de julho de 1089, em Wittering, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye родился около 1044 г. в местности блеи, гиронд, аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Perigord, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Bigod около 1074 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 июля 1089 г. в местности виттиринг, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye nació aproximadamente 1044, en Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Agnes Perigord, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Anne Bigod aproximadamente 1074, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de julio de 1089, en Wittering, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años.
